summary: Created provisioning-fixtures.ts with helper functions (createMockOperation, createMockAdapter, createMockCredentials, createMockQueueEntry, createLinearAdapterChain, createDiamondAdapterChain, createMockClient) and provisioning-integration.test.ts with 50 integration tests covering: fixture helpers, end-to-end multi-adapter flows (linear and diamond dependency patterns), lock behavior and concurrency (same-app queuing, different-app parallelism, lock release), database state verification (INSERT params, status transitions, error message storage), and error recovery/retry scenarios. All 155 tests pass with 98.51% statement coverage and 100% function coverage on the orchestration layer.
